message:
feat(core,mvcc,vdbe): explicit concurrent round tests, MVCC lifecycle/merge refinements, VDBE cold-state instrumentation expansion

Core connection:
- Add test_explicit_concurrent_rounds_single_connection_preserve_increment_base_bd_rjc
  verifying 128 sequential BEGIN CONCURRENT / UPDATE / COMMIT rounds on a
  single connection correctly preserve the increment base without drift

MVCC:
- Lifecycle refinements for improved concurrent transaction coordination
- Minor invariants adjustments for version store resolve paths
- Physical merge adjustments for cell parsing edge cases

VDBE engine:
- Expand cold-state tracking instrumentation to cover additional opcode
  paths that touch expensive subsystem collections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
